title: [Screenful] Formula columns are now supported in Analytics & Reports
excerpt:
Hey folks :wave:, this has been a show stopper for so many of our users so I wanted to share that you can now finally use data from Formula columns in your Screenful charts and reports :partying_face: 
:point_right: Crea…

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks , this has been a show stopper for so many of our users so I wanted to share that you can now finally use data from Formula columns in your Screenful charts and reports

Create custom charts using 15+ different chart types
Use a formula column as the unit in any of the charts
Create charts based on top level items and subitems
Slice & dice by date range and filters
Place charts in Monday dashboard or schedule to be sent via email
Export data in csv or json

Learn more from the blog post or see the guide for getting started
